name: Aunn Zara
overview: Story revolves around two individuals, Aunn and Zara. Both are equally spoiled by their families but are poles apart. Both get married (to avoid the problems faced due to their families) and find twists in each turn.

trailers.title: Aunn Zara | Official Trailer | Osman Khalid Butt | Maya Ali | Streaming Now On ZEE5
